g.text: Adjust the forces to move the helicopter.

span.style: background-color: #10b981; color: white; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; margin-right: 15px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; text-transform: uppercase;

div.p: The upward force created by the main rotor blades spinning through the air. Lift directly opposes weight. When lift is greater than weight, the helicopter accelerates upward (climbs). When they are perfectly equal, it hovers or maintains level flight.
